title: Extraction of Surface-Community DNA from Macroalgal Thalli
author: Torsten Thomas

steps.title: Collect several marcoalgal thalli (e
steps.instruction: Collect several marcoalgal thalli (e.g Ulva sp.) and transfer into bag/container with seawater. T

steps.title: Chop the remaining thalli into piece...
steps.instruction: Chop the remaining thalli into piece of roughly 2-4 cm length/width

steps.title: Wash the thalli 3 times for...
steps.instruction: Wash the thalli 3 times for 1-2 min with CMFSW; make sure smaller bits and non-algal material get wash away

steps.title: Using a balance, weigh out 10-20...
steps.instruction: Using a balance, weigh out 10-20 g of wet-weight (drip dry) into a petri dish

steps.title: Transfer thallus material into a sterile...
steps.instruction: Transfer thallus material into a sterile 50 ml Falcon tube with 30 ml of CMFSW and 300 μl of 3M Multi Enzyme Cleaner (article number 70500).

steps.title: Shake gently to make sure the...
steps.instruction: Shake gently to make sure the thalli surface is covered with the CMFSW/ cleaner mix and incubate at room temperature. Typically 30-180 min of incubations is enough.

steps.title: Check removal of microbial cells and...
steps.instruction: Check removal of microbial cells and integrity of macroalgal surface by microscopy. If macroalgal surface, then consider using higher dilutions (e.g. 30 or 3 μl f 3M Multi Enzyme Cleaner in 30 ml of CMFSW). If microbial cells are not removed, then increase incubation time.

steps.title: Transfer liquid into 1 or 2...
steps.instruction: Transfer liquid into 1 or 2 new 50 ml Falcon tubes. Fill tubes with no more than 20 ml and make sure no thalli material is being transferred. Optionally the liquid can be filtered through a sterile 125 μm sieve or a 0.8 μm filter

steps.title: Add an equal volume of phenol/...
steps.instruction: Add an equal volume of phenol/ chloroform/ isoamylalcohol (25:24:1) to the supernatant and shake gently but thoroughly

steps.title: Centrifuge for 5 min at 2,000 x g
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 5 min at 2,000 x g

steps.title: Transfer aqueous phase into a sterile SS-34 tubes (or equivalent)
steps.instruction: Transfer aqueous phase into a sterile SS-34 tubes (or equivalent)

steps.title: Add 1/10 volume of 3M sodium...
steps.instruction: Add 1/10 volume of 3M sodium acetate and 3 volumes of 95% ethanol

steps.title: Shake gently but thoroughly
steps.instruction: Shake gently but thoroughly. A white precipitate may become visible

steps.title: Incubate at −20°C for at least 2 hours
steps.instruction: Incubate at −20°C for at least 2 hours

steps.title: Centrifuge for 30 min at 20,000 x g
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 30 min at 20,000 x g

steps.title: Remove supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant

steps.title: Add 10 ml of ice-cold 70% ethanol to pellet
steps.instruction: Add 10 ml of ice-cold 70% ethanol to pellet

steps.title: Centrifuge for 5 min at 20,000 x g
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 5 min at 20,000 x g

steps.title: Remove supernatant and air-dry pellet
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and air-dry pellet

steps.title: Resuspend pellet in 0
steps.instruction: Resuspend pellet in 0.5 ml sterile water and transfer into 2 ml microcentrifuge tube

steps.title: Add 1/10 volume of 3M sodium...
steps.instruction: Add 1/10 volume of 3M sodium acetate and 3 volumes of 95% ethanol

steps.title: Shake gently but thoroughly
steps.instruction: Shake gently but thoroughly. A white precipitate may become visible

steps.title: Incubate at −20°C for at least 2 hours
steps.instruction: Incubate at −20°C for at least 2 hours

steps.title: Centrifuge for 30 min at 20,000 x g
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 30 min at 20,000 x g

steps.title: Remove supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant

steps.title: Add 1 ml of ice-cold 70% ethanol to pellet
steps.instruction: Add 1 ml of ice-cold 70% ethanol to pellet

steps.title: Centrifuge for 5 min at 20,000 x g
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 5 min at 20,000 x g

steps.title: Remove supernatant and air-dry pellet
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and air-dry pellet

steps.title: Resuspend pellet into 50-100μl TE-buffer (10...
steps.instruction: Resuspend pellet into 50-100μl TE-buffer (10 mM Tris-HCl, 1 mM EDTA, pH 8.0)

steps.title: Check appr
steps.instruction: Check appr. 1 μl of extracted DNA on agarose gel
